hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'features/.*\.zig$'; then CONTENT=$(jq -r '(.tool_input.new_string // "") + (.tool_input.content // "")'); if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -q '@import("abi")'; then echo 'BLOCKED: @import("abi") in features/ causes circular imports. Use relative imports instead.' >&2; exit 1; fi; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.zigversion'; then echo 'WARNING: .zigversion edit detected — MUST also update atomically: build.zig.zon and .github/workflows/ci.yml. Run tools/zigly --install to re-download.'; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.zig$'; then ZIG=$(bash tools/zigly --status 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$ZIG" ] && [ -x "$ZIG" ]; then "$ZIG" fmt "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; elif command -v zig >/dev/null 2>&1; then zig fmt "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/mod\.zig$'; then STUB=$(echo "$FILE" | sed 's/mod\.zig$/stub.zig/'); [ -f "$STUB" ] && echo "WARNING: stub.zig exists alongside this mod.zig — remember to update $STUB to keep signatures in sync. Run 'zig build check-parity' to verify." || true; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/stub\.zig$'; then MOD=$(echo "$FILE" | sed 's/stub\.zig$/mod.zig/'); [ -f "$MOD" ] && echo "WARNING: mod.zig exists alongside this stub.zig — verify $MOD doesn't need matching changes. Run 'zig build check-parity' to verify." || true; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/src/root\.zig$'; then echo 'WARNING: src/root.zig changed — update test/mod.zig if public API surface changed. Run: ./build.sh test --summary all'; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'features/[^/]+/(mod|stub)\.zig$'; then FEATURE=$(echo "$FILE" | sed -E 's|.*/features/([^/]+)/.*|\1|'); if ! grep -q "\"$FEATURE\"" src/core/feature_catalog.zig 2>/dev/null; then echo "WARNING: Feature '$FEATURE' edited but not found in feature_catalog.zig"; fi; fi
